title: The Fundraising Tactic AI Startups Are Using to Juice Valuations
full_text:
AI is accelerating at a breathtaking pace, and capital is racing to keep up.
AI is accelerating at a breathtaking pace, and capital is racing to keep up.
The Wall Street Journal spotlighted a fundraising tactic where different investors buy into the same company at dramatically different prices, often within days, creating a higher “headline valuation” and a big momentum moment.
Here’s my view, and I said it directly: Most of the VCs I interface with, they would not do a deal nor would they participate in a deal where some investors would get dramatically better terms at the same time.
Why? Because trust and alignment matter.
AI is a once in a generation platform shift. The winners will not be defined by financial engineering. They’ll be defined by real adoption, measurable outcomes, and clean governance that keeps everyone pulling in the same direction.
https://lnkd.in/gVStZkuk
